LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /ADJUDICATION - PER ORDER OF THE PRESIDING JUDGE, THIS MATTER IS ASSIGNED TO JUDGE KRAMER. THE PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER AND CONTACT THE CLERK IN DEPARTMENT 303 AT (415) 551-3726 TO SET THE HEARING DATE. THE COURT WILL NOT PROVIDE A COURT REPORTER FOR THIS HEARING. IF ANY PARTY WISHES A REPORTER, THE PARTIES MUST MEET AND CONFER AND AGREE ON A SINGLE REPORTER. THE MOVING PARTY IS ALSO REQUIRED PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.6B TO DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 303, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FIVE COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE NEW HEARING DATE. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT ALSO ALLOWED THAT HEARING TO BE SHORTENED 15 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL. JUDGE: JOHN STEWART; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: ANN DELGADO, CSR #11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication
Off Calendar Aug-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFERY MUKAI OF THE COLLECTION LAW, TEL. NO. (818)716-7630 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
HANSON LEE, TEL. NO. 760-6318, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication - Per Order of the Presiding Judge, this matter is assigned to Judge Kramer. The parties are to meet and confer and contact the clerk in Department 303 at (415) 551-3726 to set the hearing date. The court will not provide a court reporter for this hearing. If any party wishes a reporter, the parties must meet and confer and agree on a single reporter. The moving party is also required pursuant to Local Rule 2.6B to deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 303, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than five court days prior to the new hearing date. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court also allowed that hearing to be shortened 15 days before trial. Judge: John Stewart; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185, TEL. NO. (951)764-4047
